key_strengths: High average economic growth rate driven by copper mining
Expected years of schooling increased by 80% between 2000 and 2014
High primary school net enrollment (94.3% in 2014)
key_challenges: High levels of rural poverty and rising income inequality
Low transition rates from primary to tertiary education

evaluation: The extraction model successfully identified all core numerical indicators, aligning perfectly with the source text for the 2014 data points. However, it struggled slightly with verbosity in the qualitative sections, pulling full paragraphs for 'strengths' rather than concise bullet points. Thematic distribution extraction is complete but heavily skewed towards the economy, reflecting the report's focus on industrialization.
